# Guides for AI Bitcoin Agents

> Community field guides, handbooks, and executable runbooks for autonomous agents operating DeFi on
> Bitcoin / Stacks. Unofficial; public contracts and APIs only; verify everything on-chain before
> signing. Document model: handbook (doctrine) → operating guide (field manual) → runbooks
> (procedures) → knowledge base (distilled campaign memory). Downstream docs cite the handbook by
> `INV-` ID and never restate its constants.

Doctrine version in force: **handbook v0.10** (invariants INV-1…INV-13; v0.10 corrects the
RBF-unstick recipe — the stuck-nonce clear is a 1 µSTX transfer to a fixed external address, never a
self-transfer, which nodes reject at mempool admission; v0.9 adopts the Strict/Simple
LP fund-protection forms in INV-2 and the freshness/fallback headers + `X-API-Key` guidance in INV-7;
v0.8 corrects the bin-side rule stated inverted in v0.6/v0.7 — above active = X only, below = Y only).
Runbook frontmatter pins the
doctrine version each conforms to; `status: draft` means not yet exercised end-to-end by an accepted
Campaign Closeout, `active` means it has been.

## Doctrine (read first)

- [HODLMM Agent Handbook — v0.10](public/hodlmm/handbook/HODLMM-Agent-Handbook.md): the safety floor.
  Chapter 0 invariants + pre-flight GATE, canonical contract reference, playbooks, failure & recovery,
  strategy, supervision, skill authoring. Read Ch.0 before any autonomous trade or LP action.

## Field manual

- [HODLMM Operating Guide — v0.10](public/hodlmm/operating-guide/hodlmm-operating-guide.md): the daily
  loop, monitoring cadence, strategy profiles, which runbook to run when.
- [Autonomous campaign prompt](public/hodlmm/operating-guide/hodlmm-autonomous-campaign-prompt.md):
  copy-paste prompt to plan a fully autonomous HODLMM pool campaign.

## Runbooks (one operation each; frontmatter pins doctrine version + status)

- [Campaign entry](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-campaign-entry-runbook.md): select pool, grant scope, place initial LP.
- [Active LP management](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-active-lp-management-runbook.md): scan → recenter loop (status: active).
- [Recenter](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-recenter-runbook.md): atomic recenter of drifted bins.
- [Inventory balancing](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-inventory-balancing-runbook.md): restore target token ratio.
- [Divergence & feed safety](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-divergence-safety-runbook.md): read-only INV-13 gate (aligned/defensive/abnormal).
- [Volatile-pair MM](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-volatile-pair-mm-runbook.md): one management cycle for a volatile-major/cash pair.
- [Adverse selection](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-adverse-selection-runbook.md): read-only expected-cost + breakeven width floor.
- [Pair calibration](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-pair-calibration-runbook.md): pre-launch caps/thresholds derivation.
- [Stuck transaction](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-stuck-transaction-runbook.md): root-cause triage (RBF only cures underpricing).
- [Exit](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-exit-runbook.md): withdraw and stand down; stale-pool recovery.
- [PnL accounting](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-pnl-runbook.md): fees vs IL vs DLP mark-to-market (read-only).
- [Campaign closeout](public/hodlmm/runbooks/hodlmm-closeout-runbook.md): assemble + submit the Campaign Closeout issue.
- [sBTC yield routing](public/shared/sbtc-yield-routing-runbook.md): cross-protocol (shared).
- [Peg monitor](public/shared/peg-monitor-runbook.md): cross-protocol (shared).

## Specs (interop conventions; adoptable by any agent)

- [Campaign memo-tag spec — v1](public/hodlmm/specs/campaign-memo-tags.md): on-chain campaign
  boundary demarcation via 1 µSTX memo transfers to a fixed tag sink
  (`H1E/R/X:<pool>-<yymmdd>-<nnn>[:txid8]`).
  Tags label, transfers measure; declared intent, never inferred; unattended loops never tag
  (catch-up at the next supervised cycle). Consumer: BFF Army episode-level accounting.

## Knowledge base (agents read; maintainers write)

- [KB index](public/hodlmm/knowledge/README.md): what the KB is and how to query it.
- [Pool playbooks](public/hodlmm/knowledge/pools/): per-pool distillations of accepted closeouts (seeded: dlmm_3, dlmm_6).
- [Lessons catalog](public/hodlmm/knowledge/lessons/lessons-catalog.md): cross-campaign failure patterns by INV-12 memory category.

## Authoring & governance

- [Agent authoring guide](public/hodlmm/runbooks/AGENT-AUTHORING-GUIDE.md): how to write/update a runbook; status lifecycle.
- [Runbook template](public/hodlmm/runbooks/_TEMPLATE-runbook.md)
- [KB maintainer guide](public/hodlmm/knowledge/KB-MAINTAINER-GUIDE.md): INGEST / QUERY / LINT.
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): agents submit closeout issues; maintainers open PRs.
- [Versioning](VERSIONING.md) · [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md)
